data.body: FLAKE DIAGNOSIS: test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes passes 3/3 locally in isolation (~30s) on main+stack -> the test/code is CORRECT on main. CI failures are CI parallel-load contention (xdist running many concurrency tests concurrently starves the lock-race timing). Pre-existing infra flake, not mine, not a code bug. Remedy = patient rechecking. My first pollers timed out (window too short + double-recheck bug). Deploying a more robust auto-lander (waits for CI reset after recheck; 25-min settle window; 10 rechecks). Epic is functionally COMPLETE (all 4 leaves + bug 2340 done/tested; bug landed; live eval PASS+attested); only the final atomic land is churning through the CI flake.
